--- Main Page ---
Tin Lizzy's Cantina | Tacos, Cocktails, & Good Vibes
ORDER ONLINE
BREAK OUT OF YOUR SHELL
Our menu doesn’t fit the mold, and our flavors transcend borders. There’s no wrong way to taco with our creative creations involving buttermilk fried chicken, Korean BBQ, Philly cheesesteak, and Impossible™ taco meat. If our signature tacos aren’t piquing your interest, we’ve got fresh salads and sizzling skillets to wow every tastebud at your table. Keep the party going with one of our made-to-order margaritas that’s sure to delight. With unexpected flavors and bold combinations, there’s something for everyone at Tin Lizzy’s.

--- Page: /about-us ---
About Us - Tin Lizzy's Cantina
ABOUT US
Taco-Fueled, Tequila-Infused, ATL-Born
Back in 2005, four friends had one mission: bring tacos, tequila, and good times to the neighborhood—and do it their way. Tin Lizzy’s was built on bold flavors, cold drinks, and the kind of hospitality that turns strangers into regulars. What started in Atlanta has grown into a go-to spot for anyone who believes queso counts as a food group and margaritas taste better with a side of music and mischief. We’re not exactly traditional—but that’s kind of the point.
You’ll find Tin Lizzy’s in the metro Atlanta area, with locations in Downtown, Midtown, and Kennesaw. Wherever you find us, expect good vibes and even better tacos.
NO RULES, JUST REALLY GOOD TACOS
Our menu doesn’t play by the book—and that’s why people love it. Start with the fan-favorite Three Amigos (queso, guac, salsa) and our can’t-stop-won’t-stop house-fried chips, dusted in a secret seasoning blend that keeps people coming back. From Chicken Con Queso Tacos to Cowboy Skillet Bowls and our loaded Taco Salad, there’s something for every appetite—including what we proudly call Atlanta’s best Fried Lobster Tacos.
Each Tin Lizzy’s location brings its own flair, but the vibe’s always the same: laid-back, a little loud, and built for fun.
Hosting a crew? We’ve got you. From group dining to catering for your next party, Tin Lizzy’s makes it easy to bring the tacos—and the party—wherever the good times are happening.
IN THE COMMUNITY
At Tin Lizzy’s we’re all about service, and that means serving the communities we’re a part of, too. We proudly sponsor and partner with these charities.

--- Page: /catering-events ---
Catering & Events - Tin Lizzy's Cantina
PLAN AN EVENT
If tacos and margaritas are your love language, you’re in the right place.
Tin Lizzy’s is where Atlanta comes to celebrate—whether it’s a birthday dinner, a corporate lunch that doesn’t feel like one, or a rehearsal dinner with more queso than awkward speeches. Our flexible spaces, flavorful menu, and genuinely friendly service make us a standout for group dining in Atlanta. We also offer catering for pickup or delivery, featuring our signature tacos, house-made salsas, and all the extras to feed a crowd with zero stress.
Less Planning, More Partying
From kid-friendly gatherings to restaurant buyouts, Tin Lizzy’s is built for fun without the fuss. Just tell us what you’re celebrating—and we’ll bring the flavor.

meta.meta_description: Combining flavorful food and made-to-order cocktails with chill vibes is where we thrive. Let us take your tastebuds on vacation.
